# Vendored Intel U3D SDK Archive

This directory contains an offline mirror of the Intel Universal 3D Sample Software release used by FBX2U3D.

- Archive: `U3D_A_061228_5.zip`
- Purpose: keep the project buildable and installable if the upstream SourceForge URL becomes unavailable
- Upstream project: https://sourceforge.net/projects/u3d/
- Upstream license: Apache License 2.0

The Apache license text for this vendored SDK copy is included as `LICENSE-APACHE-2.0.txt`.
